# Search scaled content farm

## Signal layer

`usefulness`

## Pattern to test

mass pages target search rankings.

## Graph representation

domain-page-topic graph.

## Useful metrics

topic sprawl, content similarity, link patterns, old-domain pivot.

## Verification question

Does the observed traction signal look more like independent behaviour or repeated coordinated/synthetic signalling?

## Evidence to combine

- network structure
- temporal bursts
- content similarity
- disclosure or incentive evidence
- actor history
- external reporting or platform/regulator evidence
- downstream quality of demand

## Examples / source anchors

Google scaled content abuse policy.

## Safe wording

"The observed pattern is consistent with `search scaled content farm` risk indicators under the tested model. This does not by itself prove intent, fraud, or illegality."
